title: 「Not to mention」句型
titleEn: Using Not to mention to add another relevant point

omissions: English versions of Chinese-only Important Rules and Benefits explanations are faithful editorial translations.

formula: Main statement + , not to mention + noun / noun phrase

formulas.labelEn: Add a noun or noun phrase
formulas.formula: Main statement + , not to mention + noun / noun phrase
Main statement + , not to mention + verb-ing phrase
Main statement + , not to mention + adjective / adjective phrase
Main statement + , not to mention + the fact that + clause

example: He can speak English and Spanish, not to mention his native French.
exampleZh: 他會說英文和西班牙文，更不用說他的母語法文了。

examples.en: He can speak English and Spanish, not to mention his native French.
examples.zh: 他會說英文和西班牙文，更不用說他的母語法文了。
examples.highlight: not to mention his native French

examples.en: She has to manage the entire team, not to mention handling all customer complaints.
examples.zh: 她必須管理整個團隊，更不用說還要處理所有顧客投訴了。

examples.en: The flat is small, not to mention expensive.
examples.zh: 這個單位很小，更不用說價錢還很昂貴了。

meaning.zh: Not to mention 用來在第一項資料後加入另一項相關資料；後面的資料通常更值得注意、更令人意外，或能進一步加強前面的意思。

rules.zh: Not to mention 是固定詞組，不要改成 not mention、not mentioning 或 not to mentioning。
rules.en: Not to mention is a fixed expression.

rules.zh: Not to mention 前面通常使用逗號。
rules.en: A comma is normally used before not to mention.

rules.zh: 後面的資料必須與前面的資料相關，而不是突然轉換話題。
rules.en: The information after not to mention must be related to the first point.

rules.zh: 當 not to mention 後面是一項行動時，本練習使用 not to mention + verb-ing。
rules.en: In this exercise, use a verb-ing phrase to add another action.

rules.zh: Not to mention 主要加入另一項相關資料；let alone 通常包含更明顯的程度差距。
rules.en: Not to mention adds another relevant point; let alone normally expresses a clearer scale of difficulty or possibility.

benefits.zh: 這個句型可以加入另一項更值得注意的資料，令你的意思更有說服力。
benefits.en: It adds a stronger supporting point.

benefits.zh: 你可以把兩項相關資料放進同一句，不需要寫成數個短句。
它能避免反覆使用 and、also 或 in addition，使句式更多變。
benefits.en: It avoids repeatedly using and also.

benefits.zh: 放在 not to mention 後面的資料會得到較大的注意。
benefits.en: It places emphasis on the second point.

benefits.zh: 它可用於日常對話、作文、報告和簡報，幫助你自然地發展一個觀點。
benefits.en: It is useful in speaking and writing.

sourceOmissions: English versions of Chinese-only Important Rules and Benefits explanations are faithful editorial translations.

en: Rewrite each sentence using not to mention. Keep the original meaning unchanged.
The first word of each answer has been provided.
zh: 使用 not to mention 改寫以下句子，並保持原意不變。
每題已提供答案的第一個字。

questions.prompt: Liam can cook simple meals, and he can also bake bread.
questions.promptZh: 利亞姆會煮簡單的飯菜，而且還會烘焙麵包。
questions.answer: Liam can cook simple meals, not to mention baking bread.
questions.answerZh: 利亞姆會煮簡單的飯菜，更不用說還會烘焙麵包了。
questions.highlight: Liam can cook simple meals, not to mention baking bread.

questions.prompt: Emma owns a laptop and also a tablet.
questions.promptZh: 艾瑪擁有一部手提電腦，還有一部平板電腦。
questions.answer: Emma owns a laptop, not to mention a tablet.
questions.answerZh: 艾瑪擁有一部手提電腦，更不用說還有一部平板電腦了。

questions.prompt: Why did the manager reject the plan? It was too expensive, and it would also take six months to complete.
questions.promptZh: 經理為甚麼拒絕這個計劃？計劃成本太高，而且需要六個月才能完成。

questions.promptZh: 馬庫斯提早完成了項目，而且成功把開支控制在原定預算之內。
questions.answer: Marcus completed the project ahead of schedule, not to mention staying within the original budget.
questions.answerZh: 馬庫斯提早完成了項目，更不用說還把開支控制在原定預算之內了。
questions.highlight: Marcus completed the project ahead of schedule, not to mention staying within the original budget.

questions.prompt: An emergency team worked through the night, and it also helped more than 100 residents leave the area safely.
questions.promptZh: 一支緊急應變隊伍通宵工作，還協助超過一百名居民安全離開該區。
questions.answer: An emergency team worked through the night, not to mention helping more than 100 residents leave the area safely.
questions.answerZh: 一支緊急應變隊伍通宵工作，更不用說還協助超過一百名居民安全離開該區了。
questions.highlight: An emergency team worked through the night, not to mention helping more than 100 residents leave the area safely.

questions.prompt: This community programme has improved children’s reading skills. It has also given parents practical ways to support learning at home.
questions.promptZh: 這個社區計劃提升了兒童的閱讀能力，還為家長提供在家支援學習的實用方法。
questions.answer: This community programme has improved children’s reading skills, not to mention giving parents practical ways to support learning at home.
questions.answerZh: 這個社區計劃提升了兒童的閱讀能力，更不用說還為家長提供了在家支援學習的實用方法。
questions.highlight: This community programme has improved children’s reading skills, not to mention giving parents practical ways to support learning at home.
